task_completion.description: Verify the agent explored the source code directory using terminal commands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing commands like 'ls', 'cd', 'cat', or 'grep' executed within the '/opt/openice/mdpnp/' directory structure.

task_completion.description: Verify at least 2 simulated device adapters of different types were created in the GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenICE Supervisor GUI showing at least two different simulated devices (e.g., Multiparameter Monitor, Pulse Oximeter, ECG) active or running.

task_completion.description: Verify at least 1 clinical application was launched from the GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A clinical application window (e.g., Vital Signs, Infusion Safety) opened via the OpenICE Supervisor GUI.

task_completion.description: Verify that device data flows to the clinical application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The launched clinical application UI displays active data, such as waveforms or updating numerical values, originating from the simulated devices.

task_completion.description: Verify the comprehensive assessment report was saved with all required sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the file '/home/ga/Desktop/openice_architecture_assessment.txt' containing the 6 required sections: Project Structure Overview, Available Device Types (>=4), Available Clinical Applications (>=2), Technology Stack, Functional Verification Summary, and Recommendation.

integrity.description: Check that the agent actually interacted with the OpenICE Supervisor GUI to perform functional verification.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the OpenICE Supervisor GUI and clinical app windows open and interacted with, not just a text editor writing the report.

integrity.description: Check that the agent used the terminal to explore the source code as instructed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of terminal windows showing directory navigation and file inspection in '/opt/openice/mdpnp/', proving the agent didn't just hallucinate the report.

integrity.description: Check that the report contains genuine findings rather than just copy-pasted prompt text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should list specific tech stack elements (Java, Gradle, JavaFX, DDS) and specific module names/descriptions found during exploration, rather than just repeating the prompt's instructions.
